prestazioni: 13B-REW (twin-rotor Wankel, 654cc x 2) engine rebuild with Mazdaspeed Group A-spec porting, 10.5:1 apex seal compression, and custom billet eccentric shafts by Rotary Aviation for 1,200+ hp reliability on VP Racing Q16 fuel

Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (88mm inducer, 1.15 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegate and custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe by Racing Beat, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 2.2 bar peak pressure

Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with custom 13B-REW-specific fuel and ignition maps, integrated with a Link G4+ Monsoon for sequential twin-injector control (primary: ID1700x, secondary: ID2000cc) and dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps with Aeromotive FPR
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody conversion with carbon fiber overfenders (front: +3.5", rear: +4.2"), custom aluminum inner fender liners, and custom 5-axis CNC-machined aluminum rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (PB-FC3S kit)

Custom 19x10.5" (front) and 19x12" (rear) Work Meister S1 3P wheels with 245/35R19 and 295/30R19 Yokohama Advan A052 tires, mounted on custom 5x114.3 to 4x114.3 adapters with extended wheel studs by 5Zigen

Full carbon fiber interior by Auto Salon Craft, including custom Recaro SPG XL seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, carbon fiber door cards, and a custom 13B-specific digital dash by AIM MXS Strada with rotary-specific AFR and EGT logging
